text: דירה בתל אביב ליד דיזנגוף, כניסה 1.8, ₪7500, טלפון 054-1234567. בלי חיות.
instructions: Extract apartment listing fields from the raw Facebook post text. Return structured price, entry/available date, contact phone, address, and unstructured conditionals/caveats as freeform text. Callback to Homie ingest with the Bearer token; do not expect Temporal to wait.
